title: Trentotto
description: A mix of tech and magic to achieve the best possible multiplayer experience, now with mantis shrimps
body:
# 38 - The Trentottening
A gorgeous kitchen sink with a mix of tech, magic and mantis shrimps

With more than 38 mods included, including but not excluding:
- Patchouli
- Spark
- Alex's Mobs (with mantis shrimps)

This modpack features:
- A lot of blocks you'll never use
- 4 kinds of completely identical pipes
- 2 storage drawer mods
- 6 different kinds of coal generators
- mantis shrimps!

If you're not convinced yet here's a royalty free picture of a mantis shrimp:
![a mantis shrimp](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/39/OdontodactylusScyllarus2.jpg)

Many thanks to Violet Moon Modding for:
- AutoRegLib: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/autoreglib
- Patchouli: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli
- Quark Oddities: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark-oddities
- Quark: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark
- Botania: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/botania

Alexthe668 for the shrimps:
- Alex's Mobs: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs

and Snownee for:
- Jade: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade
